summary: Frontend testing of trust badge, property description, calendar, price calculation, booking modal, amenities, and practical info features. All requested features verified working on Villa Cosy property.

issues: Minor console warning: Missing Description for DialogContent (accessibility improvement - same as previous iteration)

trust_badge_homepage.details: Trust badge displays with data-testid='trust-badge'. Shows 'Paiement 100% sécurisé' and 'Service premium depuis 2011' in all 4 languages (FR/EN/ES/IT based on user locale)

description_section.details: Description section displays with h2 header. Shows fallback text when Beds24 description is empty: 'Villa Cosy... vi accoglie nella Corsica del Sud. Contattateci per maggiori informazioni.' (Italian locale)

reservation_calendar.details: Calendar displays current month (février 2026). Date buttons are clickable. Past dates are disabled. Successfully selected dates 19-23 and 20-24 in tests.

dynamic_price_calculation.details: Price correctly calculates: 900€/night x 4 nights = 3600€. Shows 'Dates disponibles - Prix garanti' message when dates are available.

booking_modal.details: Modal opens with 'Complete your booking' title. Contains: Summary (property name, dates, total price), YOUR INFORMATION form (First name, Last name, Email, Phone, Special requests), 'RÉSERVER MAINTENANT - PAIEMENT SÉCURISÉ' button, Stripe payment notice

amenities_display.details: Amenities section displays 8 items: Salle de bain complète, Télévision, Climatisation, Lave-linge, Animaux non admis, WiFi, Cuisine équipée, Parking

practical_info.details: Informations pratiques section displays for Beds24 connected property: Horaires (Arrivée: 17:00-00:00, Départ: avant 10:00), Séjour minimum (3 nuits), Caution (1500€), Frais de ménage (259€ inclus)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Beds24 synced property
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features from this iteration are working. Property URL format is /properties/{id} not /property/{id}. The trust badge adapts to user locale (detected IT/Italian in tests). Description shows fallback text when Beds24 description is empty - this is expected behavior per agent_to_agent_context_note.
